zh.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwell於1289年出生在英國戴文韋斯特 唐。她於1315年與William De Pyne III在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1326年享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwell was born in 1289, in West Down, Devon, England. She married William De Pyne III in 1315, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1326, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwell est née en 1289, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William De Pyne III en 1315, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1326, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwellは1289年にイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで生まれた。1315年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンでWilliam De Pyne IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1326年に37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwell(은)는 1289년 영국 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 William De Pyne III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel of Bradwell родилась в 1289 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Pyne III в 1315 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1326 г. в возрасте 37 лет.
